name: SpecBench
description: A benchmark for outcome-conformant relational synthesis. SpecBench measures whether a generator obeys a declared analytical outcome (an aggregate curve, a rate, or a group-wise distribution) across a relational schema, with no source data, rather than whether its output resembles a real dataset. Each task is a frozen specification plus an oracle; metrics include aggregate-match error (AME), foreign-key violation rate (FIVR), determinism (DET), cold-start capability (CSC), and constraint satisfaction (CSAT). The benchmark accompanies the paper on declarative outcome-conformant synthesis.
citeAs: SpecBench: a conformance benchmark for outcome-conformant relational synthesis (Misata project, MIT License).

distribution.name: results_e5.csv
distribution.description: Cross-paradigm leaderboard: per task, baseline, and seed metrics (AME, FIVR, CSAT, DET, CSC, input_type, seconds).

distribution.name: results_california_real.csv
distribution.description: Reference-mode result on the real California Housing dataset.

distribution.name: results_nl_suite.csv
distribution.description: Suite-level natural-language conformance across 18 domains, for three parsers (rule-based, Llama-3.3-70b, GPT-5.3-class).

distribution.name: results_pstar_frontier.csv
distribution.description: P-star frontier: marginal-distortion decomposition (constraint cost vs shape-family gap) across target marginals.

distribution.name: scale_invariance_summary.csv
distribution.description: Proposition 4 scale-invariance experiment: marginal distortion of the constrained vs unconstrained draw across tail-heaviness.

distribution.name: throughput.csv
distribution.description: Throughput comparison: closed-form generation vs SDV GaussianCopula fit-plus-sample.

recordSet.name: nl_suite
recordSet.description: Per (parser, domain) conformance of the natural-language path across 18 domains.

field.name: parser
field.description: Parser behind the engine: rule-based, groq-llama-3.3-70b, or openai-gpt-5.3.

field.name: domain
field.description: Business domain of the one-sentence specification.

field.name: curve_detected
field.description: Whether the parser produced an outcome curve.

field.name: anchor_match
field.description: Whether the parser read the declared January and December anchors correctly.

field.name: AME
field.description: Aggregate-match error of the generated data against the declared curve (0 is exact).

field.name: DET
field.description: Determinism under a fixed seed (1 is bitwise identical).

recordSet.name: pstar_frontier
recordSet.description: Decomposition of marginal distortion against an external target marginal into the cost of the exact-sum constraint and the shape-family gap.

field.name: cv_F
field.description: Coefficient of variation of the target marginal.

field.name: MD_constrained
field.description: Normalized 1-Wasserstein distance of the exact-sum engine sample to the target.

field.name: MD_unconstrained
field.description: Same distance for an unconstrained same-family draw.

field.name: constraint_cost
field.description: MD added by enforcing the exact sum (constrained minus unconstrained).

field.name: family_gap
field.description: Shape-family mismatch above the finite-sample floor.

field.name: max_sum_err
field.description: Largest absolute period sum error over the sweep (near zero).
